vocab.meaning: các hoạt động làm vườn/trồng trọt
vocab.example: My early horticultural pursuits were limited to tending a few pots of sun-loving marigolds on our balcony.
I remember the sheer excitement of watching the mung bean seeds finally germinate after days of careful watering.
I chose to grow aloe vera because it could easily withstand the arid conditions of my bedroom windowsill.
My science teacher encouraged us to grow sunflowers to witness the fascinating process of photosynthesis firsthand.

vocab.meaning: tán lá xanh tươi tốt/xum xuê
vocab.example: I was particularly proud of my fern, which eventually developed such lush foliage that it covered the entire shelf.

vocab.meaning: tự cung tự cấp/tự duy trì
vocab.example: We attempted to create a self-sustaining vegetable patch in the backyard to provide fresh herbs for our daily meals.
I planted a jasmine climber near the fence, and its fragrant white blossoms soon draped over the woodwork.
The tulips provided a spectacular seasonal bloom every spring, becoming the centerpiece of our tiny garden.
Watching bees hover over my lavender plants taught me about the vital role of pollination in our ecosystem.

vocab.meaning: loài cây chịu hạn/sức sống tốt
vocab.example: As a novice, I stuck to hardy species like snake plants that required very little maintenance to thrive.
